history.content:
<thought>
I am facing right, but the cell directly to my right is lava. Turning left would face up into a wall, so turning right to face down is better, as it allows me to move down along column 1 which is clear floor. I need to eventually go down to row5 then right to column 7 then down to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing down. The goal is at (7,7). I need to go down along column 1 to row 5, then right across row 5 to column 7, then down to row 7. My next immediate move is to go down to (2,1), which is a floor cell. So I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at position (row2, col1) facing down. Directly below me is an empty cell (row3, col1). To eventually reach the goal at the bottom right, I need to first move downward along this column until I reach row5, then turn right to go east. So the immediate next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column 1, facing down. The goal is at row 7, column 7. A clear route is to go down to row 5, then right along the row of floor, then down to the goal. Moving forward will take me to (4,1), which is a floor cell, so that is a safe next step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 5, column 2 (1-indexed) facing down. The cell directly below is empty ('.'), so moving forward is safe. To eventually reach the goal at the bottom-right, I need to go down first, then turn left to face right, move right across the row, then turn right to face down and move down to the goal. The immediate step is to move down.
</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>

<thought>
I am facing down at position (5,1). Moving forward would lead into lava at (6,1). To reach the goal at (7,7), I need to first move right along row 5, which is clear of lava. So I should turn left to face east (right) before moving.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (5,1) facing right. The goal is at (7,7). Directly ahead to the east is an empty floor cell, so I can move forward. I will proceed along this clear corridor until I reach the rightmost column, then turn downward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>

<thought>
I am at (row5, col2) facing right. The cell directly ahead (row5, col3) is a floor cell ('.'), so I can move forward safely. The goal is at (row7, col7), so moving right along row5 towards the right edge is a good first step to eventually go down. There is no obstacle immediately ahead.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at position (row5, col3) facing right. The goal is at (row7, col7) to the southeast. There is a clear path: moving right along row5 to col7, then turning right to face down, and moving down two steps to the goal. I will start by moving forward to the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, col 5 facing right. The goal is at row 8, col 8. The immediate cell ahead is empty (col 6). To reach the goal, I plan to move right three times to reach the rightmost column, then turn down and move down two rows. So my first action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (5,5) facing right. The goal is at (7,7). I can move forward twice to (5,7), then turn right to face down, then move forward twice to the goal. The path is clear of obstacles. So the next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 5, column 6, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 7, column 7 (`G`). Moving forward one step to (5,7) is safe (`.`), which brings us closer to the goal. After that, we can turn right to face down and then move forward twice to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (5,7) facing right. The goal is directly below at (7,7). To move down, I need to change my orientation. Turning right will make me face down, allowing me to move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column 7, facing down. The goal is at row 7, column 7, directly below me. The cells directly ahead are both floor (row 6, col 7) and then goal (row 7, col 7), so moving forward twice will reach the goal. The immediate next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column 7 facing down. The goal is at row 7, column 7 directly below me. Moving forward will reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
